title: Client Counter
description: This is a simple mod for the Fabric Loader, that allows you to see how many total players are connected to a server.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

This is a simple mod that allows you to view the current client (player) count on the server you are connected to in the Action Bar (HUD element above the Hot Bar). This mod can be toggled with the **P** key (by default), which is under the **Client Counter** keybinding category. For a visual of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or visit this mod's **Gallery Tab**.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WPOpCSKP1io" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
